caption: A screen recording shows a web browser displaying a randomizer list from RANDOM.ORG. The page lists names from 11 to 30, including "Michael Loguencio" and "Scott Eckert," and mentions a "BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/3ZeS8K9." At the bottom, a small video inset shows a man with a beard and a black shirt gesturing with his hands. He is positioned in front of a dark background. The page includes a footer for "CASEBREAKS.COM" with the logo "JAY'S CASE BREAKS." As the sequence progresses, the user interacts with the browser, navigating away from the list to a home page that reads "RANDOM.ORG" in large blue letters and "True Random Number Se" in smaller text. A "List Randomizer" section appears, showing a new ordered list of names from 1 to 19, starting with "Michael Loguencio." The man in the video inset remains present throughout.
